title: calamus plicatus
intro: Calamus plicatus, also known as the lesser calamus, is a type of plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, which is native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of calamus plicatus include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Calamus plicatus can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
